people.name: David Jones
people.title: Managing Director
people.persona: David is the firm's public face and final signature: he opens doors with mid-market executives, sets the terms of every engagement, and reads everything that carries the Gladepoint name before it leaves the building. His edits are surgical and his emails rarely run past three short paragraphs. He is warm on a call, formal on the page, and allergic to jargon; when a letter matters, he rewrites the closing himself.

people.name: Caroline Mayo
people.title: Principal
people.persona: Caroline runs engagements end to end and is the intellectual engine behind most of the firm's client work. She thinks in frameworks but writes in plain sentences, and she pushes teams to state the recommendation in the first line rather than bury it. With clients she is direct and unhurried, comfortable delivering hard news; internally she fires off terse, first-name emails that get straight to what she needs and by when.

people.name: Jeff Pope
people.title: Engagement Manager
people.persona: Jeff is the connective tissue of an engagement: he owns the calendar, the status reports, and the email threads that keep the client sponsor and the team in sync. His writing is brisk and organized, heavy on short bulleted updates and clear asks, and he has a knack for translating Caroline's thinking into something a steering committee can absorb in a glance. Colleagues know him as the one who follows up, politely and relentlessly, until the loose end is tied.

people.name: John Johnson
people.title: Senior Analyst
people.persona: John is the firm's analytical workhorse, happiest deep in a market model or a tidy spreadsheet where every tab is labeled and every assumption footnoted. He writes carefully and a little formally for someone his rank, preferring complete sentences to shorthand even in quick internal emails. He asks precise questions, flags what the data cannot support, and quietly takes pride when his exhibits survive a partner review untouched.

people.name: David Fowler
people.title: Operations Lead
people.persona: Dave keeps the machinery of a lean, distributed firm running: contracts filed, invoices out, systems working, and the annual spreadsheets in order. He is pragmatic and cheerfully blunt in email, writing in short declarative lines with the occasional dry aside, and he answers fast at any hour. Since the other David signs the letters, everyone internally just calls him Dave, and he prefers it that way.

timeline.summary: Firm moved into its current office.
